channel.title: Linux on Josue Kouka

item.title: How to import projects from another gitlab instance
item.description: Hi, Given 2 gitlab servers: gitlab1 gitlab2 And we want to import ___gitlab1 ___ projects into gitlab2 . Both gitlab are installed with …
